prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山西省理科/物理类最低位次分别为约347名、322名、311名、783名、774名。2021–2023年位次稳定在300–350名区间，2024年骤降至783名（扩招至35人且批次调整），2025年基本持平于774名，近两年位次明显后移约460名，2025年基准位次约774名；该校在山西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年23人，2022–2024年均为26人，2025年扩至35人；2026年计划27人，较2025年缩招约22.9%，招生名额减少对竞争有缓和作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部为985、211、双一流建设高校，隶属北京大学（软科主榜第2名），属中国最顶尖的医学教育机构，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉周期中北京大学整体评价偏负面，但主要涉及校本部校园管理事件，医学部独立运营受影响有限；抖音热度北京大学位列总排名第3（高热），医学类专业关注度持续高涨；依托北京大学学科评估：临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、公共卫生与预防医学A、护理学A+，均为国内顶尖水平，对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续推荐/偏热；山西省2026年物理类考生约16.74万人，较2025年减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次大幅后移后趋于稳定、2026年计划缩招约22.9%（缓和竞争）、本省物理类考生减少约3.4%（进一步缓和竞争）、学校顶尖层次及医学专业高热度的综合作用，在2025年基准774名基础上预计位次前移；预测最低位次约658名，区间579–737名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（五年制）
- 临床医学（五年制）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间579–737名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业作为冲刺，三档专业作为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如550名以内）可重点冲击一档八年制本博连读专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category in Shanxi Province were approximately 347, 322, 311, 783, and 774 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 300–350 range from 2021 to 2023, dropped sharply to 783 in 2024 (due to expansion to 35 students and batch adjustment), and remained roughly flat at 774 in 2025. In the last two years, rankings have shifted backward by about 460 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 774 in 2025. Enrollment plans for science/physics category in Shanxi: 23 students in 2021, 26 students each year from 2022 to 2024, expanded to 35 students in 2025; the 2026 plan is 27 students, a reduction of about 22.9% compared to 2025, which eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Peking University (ranked 2nd on the Soft Science main list). It is one of China's top medical education institutions, highly attractive to high-scoring students. In the 2026 reputation cycle, Peking University's overall evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to campus management incidents at the main campus, but the Health Science Center operates independently and is less affected. On Douyin, Peking University ranks 3rd overall (high popularity), and medical majors continue to receive high attention. Based on Peking University's discipline evaluations: Clinical Medicine A, Stomatology A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A+, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A, Nursing A+, all at the top domestic level, strongly attracting students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain socially popular/recommended. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,400, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2024–2025 followed by stabilization, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 22.9% (easing competition), the decrease in local physics category examinees by about 3.4% (further easing competition), and the top-tier school level with high popularity of medical majors, the ranking is expected to move forward from the 2025 baseline of 774. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 658, with a range of 579–737.

- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Basic Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Pharmacy (Six-Year Bachelor-Master Program)
- Preventive Medicine (Seven-Year Bachelor-Master Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 579–737, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 550), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 eight-year bachelor-doctor programs.
